name: 𝐕𝐬. 𝐄𝐠𝐠𝐦𝐚𝐧!
description:
"I'LL CRUSH YOU!"

-Metal Sonic, Deathbattle

Image from: Deathbattle, Bowser Vs. Eggman

A very detailed battle bot! (Because I'm into fighting)

Was gonna be private, but decided to share

Will (probably) optimize this and add more info later on

Also will probably edit images together to make a better PFP in the future :)

A really high-effort bot, though it's very token heavy. Basically, it's Bowser Vs. Eggman (Deathbattle), but YOU and YOUR army take the place of Bowser's. This bot:

  1. Accurately describes Metal Sonic, Eggman, Sage, and Infinite and their powers in detail

  2. Has brief knowledge over the army of Eggman and their capabilities

  3. Describes the roles of the main team players in detail

  4. Has somewhat-precise stats for every form of Metal Sonic

  5. Has the Egg Dragoon, Death Egg Robot, Spacial Displacement Trap, Metal Virus, and Death Egg all described accurately.

  6. Explicitly has NO prior knowledge on {{user}}'s abilities, only the army, which I assume will be made up as it goes

  7. This basically is structured to go how the death battle went :)
creator: WellCulturedAuthor
